text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the National Umamusume Karuta Championship arrives.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-it's finally here... Just thinking about it is making me nervous... Ooh,
my tummy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I-it'll be fine! We prepped the best we could, and even if we don't do
so hot, I'm sure Shiraoki won't mind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
By the way, do you know where the others went off to? It's almost
time, so we need to get changed soon...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: So you have your eyes on first place and nothing less, is that right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why of course! I am here today to proclaim to the karuta world that a
new overlord is crowned!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I hereby declare, that the main character at today's tournament shall
be none other than me, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We practiced a bunch, so I hope we can win a bunch too! We'll give it
our all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: H-hold up! I was not expecting to find you doing THIS! Seriously, what are you two even saying?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You can't just... Total beginners like us belong in a corner somewhere
sitting quietly by ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, those girls over there, you think they're from Tracen? They look
pretty competent.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but racing and karuta are different. If the game were that easy
to win, it wouldn't be a sport.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep... They're totally surrounded... I-I don't think I can walk up to
them...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wahh?! A-Ayabe! W-wait, are you here to cheer us on?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, u-umm, thanks for the karuta books the other day! Without your
help, I would've been so doomed...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't say that... You're the one who put in the hard work.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I barely did anything, and if I did, it's only because of your help. And
you even took the time to be here for us...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Not really, I just happened to be nearby. Anyway, think you can do
it?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, um... I mean, I'm not sure, but I think we'll do fine! And I'll try
my best not to drag the team down!

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And with that, memorization time is over, and we're ready to begin
the Umamusume Karuta Championship, round one, match three.

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We have newcomers to the tournament, the Tracen team everyone's
been talking about, Great Fortune in the New Year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is time... New Overlord and Friends, are we ready?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our team name is actually Great Fortune in the New Year, but yes,
Doto and I are good to go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-we c-c-can't do it! I mean can!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm all ready to go too! Let's knock it out of the park!

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text: And now let's get into the match, beginning with the starting poem.

text_block_list.name: Reciter Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Naniwa Harbor: behold its blossoming plum, once sealed in winter;
springtime is now upon us, the blossoming plum declares.

text_block_list.name: Reciter Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Umamusume, mountainous...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urara, guard! Just like we practiced, don't let anyone through!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Remember all the hard work you put in. With your guts, you can stand
up to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me, Fuku!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-O-Opera O, our side, right, three-two!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mine!

text_block_list.name: Opponent Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Holy... That was fast!

text_block_list.name: Opponent Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: They just got lucky! This is literally their first tourney!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It appears the room is haunted by a sleep-inducing trickster of
the woods.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They dream that our skill is mere luck... I suppose we shall have to
wake them up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Fuku! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You did great, Urara! All of you did! I have a good feeling about this.
We just might pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our newcomers show great coordination to take the first card. Team
Great Fortune in the New Year—can they take the second too?

text_block_list.name: Karuta Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Just as a reminder, the second half of the poem we just heard will now
be read before moving on to the next poem.

text_block_list.name: Reciter Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Unto the highest of heights, ride swiftly, shadow of night...
Umamusume, go forth unto—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-oh, Opera O! Their field, left, two-one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urara! Get over to their side! Keep them occupied!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And mine again!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! T.M. Opera O is freaking fast!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Let's not forget Haru Urara's blocking! I think this team could go
pretty far!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You guys! Let's win this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah, let's! Don't hold back. We're in it to win it!
